signals: NVIDIA acelera hoja de ruta hacia plataforma Rubin y ASICs de 2nm para liderar infraestructura de 10 billones.
Google despliega ecosistema Gemini 3.1 (Pro, Flash-Lite, Deep Think) priorizando eficiencia y razonamiento complejo.
El hardware especializado (ASICs) gana tracción frente a GPUs de propósito general para optimizar rendimiento en HPC.
Europa y Brasil emergen como focos clave para la soberanía digital y la aplicación climática de la inteligencia artificial.
Surge una estandarización cognitiva y metodológica de DeepMind y Anthropic para medir el progreso real hacia la AGI.
risks: Riesgos de manipulación conductual en sectores críticos como finanzas y salud por modelos altamente persuasivos.
Cuellos de botella técnicos y comerciales en la transición masiva a procesos de fabricación de chips en 2nm.
Desconexión entre el avance en generación de medios creativos y el retorno de inversión tangible en infraestructura.
watch: Desempeño real de la arquitectura Rubin de NVIDIA en centros de datos masivos frente a la competencia ASIC.
Capacidad de los modelos Deep Think para resolver problemas científicos complejos no resueltos por humanos.
Adopción de los nuevos marcos de evaluación de AGI por parte de reguladores y competidores globales.

items.title: Measuring progress toward AGI: A cognitive framework
items.summary: We’re introducing a framework to measure progress toward AGI, and launching a Kaggle hackathon to build the relevant evaluations.
items.why: Establece un marco formal para medir la AGI, moviendo la industria del hype a métricas cognitivas verificables.

items.title: Build with Lyria 3, our newest music generation model
items.why: Evolución en generación de audio que presiona el mercado creativo, aunque el impacto en productividad es moderado.

items.title: NVIDIA Rubin Platform, Open Models, Autonomous Driving: NVIDIA Presents Blueprint for the Future at CES
items.summary: NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang took the stage at the Fontainebleau Las Vegas to open CES 2026, declaring that AI is scaling into every domain and every device. “Computing has been fundamentally reshaped as a result of accelerated computing, as a result of artificial intelligence,” Huang said. “What that means is some $10 trillion […]
items.why: La plataforma Rubin define el futuro del cómputo acelerado y consolida la visión de una economía de IA de $10 billones.

items.title: Alchip’s Leadership in ASIC Innovation: Advancing Toward 2nm Semiconductor Technology
items.summary: Alchip Technologies has recently reported significant progress in the development of advanced 2nm ASICs, positioning itself as a leader in next-generation semiconductor design for AI and HPC. The announcement highlights Alchip’s efforts to commercialize cutting-edge chip technologies and deliver highly customized … Read More The post Alchip’s Leadership in ASIC Innovation: Advancing Toward 2nm Semiconductor Technology appeared first on SemiWiki .
items.why: El avance hacia 2nm en ASICs personalizados es crítico para reducir la dependencia de GPUs de propósito general.

items.title: New Anthropic Fellows Research: a new method for surfacing behavioral differences between AI models. We apply the “diff” principle from software development ...
items.summary: New Anthropic Fellows Research: a new method for surfacing behavioral differences between AI models. We apply the “diff” principle from software development to compare open-weight AI models and identify features unique to each. Read more:
items.why: Nueva metodología para diferenciar capacidades entre modelos de pesos abiertos, esencial para la transparencia técnica.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite: Built for intelligence at scale
items.summary: Gemini 3.1 Flash-Lite is our fastest and most cost-efficient Gemini 3 series model yet.
items.why: Prioriza la eficiencia operativa y el despliegue a escala, factor clave para la rentabilidad de servicios de IA masivos.

items.title: Gemini 3.1 Pro: A smarter model for your most complex tasks
items.summary: 3.1 Pro is designed for tasks where a simple answer isn’t enough.
items.why: Refuerza la oferta de modelos de alto rendimiento para tareas que requieren razonamiento profundo y multimodalidad.

items.title: Gemini 3 Deep Think: Advancing science, research and engineering
items.summary: Our most specialized reasoning mode is now updated to solve modern science, research and engineering challenges.
items.why: Enfoque en razonamiento especializado para ciencia e ingeniería, moviendo la IA hacia el descubrimiento científico real.

items.title: Build with Veo 3.1 Lite, our most cost-effective video generation model
items.why: Optimización de costes en generación de video, habilitando aplicaciones comerciales que antes eran prohibitivas.

items.title: NVIDIA CEO Drops the Blueprint for Europe’s AI Boom
items.summary: At GTC Paris — held alongside VivaTech, Europe’s largest tech event — NVIDIA founder and CEO Jensen Huang delivered a clear message: Europe isn’t just adopting AI — it’s building it. “We now have a new industry, an AI industry, and it’s now part of the new infrastructure, called intelligence infrastructure, that will be used […]
items.why: Impulsa la soberanía tecnológica europea mediante la creación de infraestructura de inteligencia local.

items.title: We invited Claude users to share how they use AI, what they dream it could make possible, and what they fear it might do. Nearly 81,000 people responded in o...
items.summary: We invited Claude users to share how they use AI, what they dream it could make possible, and what they fear it might do. Nearly 81,000 people responded in one week—the largest qualitative study of its kind. Read more:
items.why: Estudio cualitativo masivo que aporta datos sobre la percepción pública, relevante para la aceptación social y seguridad.

items.title: Protecting people from harmful manipulation
items.summary: Google DeepMind researches AI's harmful manipulation risks across areas like finance and health, leading to new safety measures.
items.why: Investigación crucial sobre manipulación conductual para prevenir abusos en sistemas financieros y de salud.

items.title: We’re creating a new satellite imagery map to help protect Brazil’s forests.
items.summary: Google partnered with the Brazilian government on a satellite imagery map to help protect the country’s forests.
items.why: Aplicación pragmática de IA y datos satelitales para la protección ambiental en biomas críticos.

items.title: It’s the Humidity: How International Researchers in Poland, Deep Learning and NVIDIA GPUs Could Change the Forecast
items.summary: For more than a century, meteorologists have chased storms with chalkboards, equations, and now, supercomputers. But for all the progress, they still stumble over one deceptively simple ingredient: water vapor. Humidity is the invisible fuel for thunderstorms, flash floods, and hurricanes. It’s the difference between a passing sprinkle and a summer downpour that sends you […]
items.why: Uso de aprendizaje profundo para resolver problemas específicos en meteorología, demostrando valor en verticales científicas.

items.title: A Gaming GPU Helps Crack the Code on a Thousand-Year Cultural Conversation
items.summary: Ceramics — the humble mix of earth, fire and artistry — have been part of a global conversation for millennia. From Tang Dynasty trade routes to Renaissance palaces, from museum vitrines to high-stakes auction floors, they’ve carried culture across borders, evolving into status symbols, commodities and pieces of contested history. Their value has been shaped […]
items.why: Caso de uso de nicho que demuestra la versatilidad del hardware de consumo en la investigación histórica.
